Utterances.Utterance: I'd like to place a takeout order.

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: I'd like to place a takeout order.)
Ask_Items (Agent: Great! What would you like to order today?)
Provide_Items (User: I'll take a pepperoni pizza and a Caesar salad.)
Confirm_Order_State (Agent: Okay, that's one pepperoni pizza and one Caesar salad. Is that correct?)
User_Confirms (User: Yes, that's right.)
Ask_Payment_Method (Agent: Perfect. Will you be paying with card or cash on pickup?)
Provide_Payment (User: I'll pay with a card.)
Process_Order_State
Provide_Pickup_Time (Agent: Your order has been placed. It will be ready for pickup in 20 minutes.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: Thanks for ordering with us!)
Greeting_State (User: Where is my delivery order?)
Ask_Order_Number (Agent: I can check that. What is your order number?)
Provide_Order_Number (User: It's order number 1234.)
Check_Status_State
Provide_Status (Agent: I see your order is with the driver and should arrive in about 10 minutes.)
Goodbye_State (User: Okay, great. Thank you.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: You're welcome. Enjoy your meal!)

Utterances.Utterance: I need to cancel the order I just placed.

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: I need to cancel the order I just placed.)
Ask_Order_Number (Agent: I can help with that if it hasn't been prepared yet. What is your order number?)
Provide_Order_Number (User: It is 5678.)
Check_Cancelable_State
Confirm_Cancellation (Agent: The kitchen hasn't started on it yet, so I have cancelled order 5678 for you.)
Goodbye_State (User: Thanks for understanding.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: No problem. Have a good day.)

Utterances.Utterance: I want to add something to my order.

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: I want to add something to my order.)
Ask_Order_Number (Agent: I can help with that if the order isn't finalized. What is the order number?)
Provide_Order_Number (User: It's 9999.)
Check_Modifiable_State
Ask_Modification (Agent: Yes, we can still modify it. What would you like to add or change?)
Provide_Modification (User: I want to add a side of fries.)
Confirm_Modification (Agent: I have added a side of fries to order 9999. Your new total is updated.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: Thank you. Have a great day!)
